summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
Mason Young is a Birmingham-based commercial property consultancy and agency, specialising in sales, lettings, lease advisory and property management, primarily in the Jewellery Quarter and fringe areas of Birmingham City Centre.

**Company:** Mason Young Property Consultants  
**Location:** 6 Warstone Mews, Warstone Lane, Jewellery Quarter, Birmingham B18 6JB  
**Phone:** 0121 285 3535  
**Email:** info@masonyoung.co.uk  

**Services:** Commercial agency (sales & lettings), acquisitions, property management, investment, development, and building surveying (schedules of condition, dilapidations).  
**Key Differentiator:** They are commercial property surveyors (not residential estate agents) with 30+ years in Birmingham and strong local expertise in the Jewellery Quarter, St. Pauls Square and Edgbaston.
